854 ROUTE_PRVDR_HC_EXCHG_INFO_CD ROUTE_PRVDR_HC_EXCHG_INFO_CD A2122B Provider Trans - Health Info Exchange CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the route(s) of transmission of the current reconciled medication list to the subsequent provider was via health informtion exchange.
